codeReview.summary: Implementation is comprehensive and covers all five advanced trigger types as specified in the feature requirements. The code adds birthday, inactivity, anniversary, low_stock, and no_show triggers with proper cron schedules and event-based handlers. All functions are properly exported and integrated into the Inngest function index.

summary: Successfully implemented advanced automation triggers feature with five new trigger types: birthday (daily 9AM), inactivity (daily 10AM), anniversary (daily 9AM), low_stock (daily 8AM), and no_show (event-based). Added client schema fields (birthday, registrationDate), trigger configuration types, and Inngest functions. All cron schedules are properly configured and functions are exported correctly. Pre-existing lint errors in unrelated files do not affect this feature.
